metadata.thoughts:
**Evaluating strike announcement**

I need to check if the document is announcing a new strike based on the strike_extraction schema. The content’s in Italian and mentions an ongoing strike from Atac, indicating it will finish at 16:30. It says, "È in corso lo sciopero," which translates to “the strike is ongoing.” It appears to be about an ongoing situation, not an upcoming strike, so I can’t set isStrike to true; it details the current strike instead.
